messages.content:
Now analyzing the lab report PDF from the provided URL using the BloomCell report-analyzer framework. Based on the PDF content (Lab results M_Redacted.pdf — a standard male blood panel), I will produce the structured 8-object analysis output following all skill rules.





✅ Document `100f0c9c-14c1-42d7-99c3-4870d36b327c` updated successfully in Cosmos DB — `highlightData` populated with 8 BloomCell analysis objects across all 4 clinical groups.
